---
title: "Publications"
description: "Peer-reviewed publications."
bibliography: references.bib
nocite: |
  @*
---

See also my full list on
[{{< fa brands google >}} Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=mvmhcLoAAAAJ&hl=en)
and [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-1938-4089).

## Peer-reviewed

::: {#refs}
:::

<!--
To add a publication: append a BibTeX entry to references.bib and it will render here
automatically (nocite: @* lists everything in the file).
-->
